title: Test Automation Engineer
description:
Vi söker dig med ett öga för detaljer, som bryr dig om kvalitet och vill vara med och utveckla hur vi testar våra produkter, både här och nu och på vår resa mot molnet.


Känner du igen dig? Bli vår nästa Test Automation Engineer!

**Vad kommer du att göra?**


Idag körs våra lösningar främst on-prem, men vi är på väg mot molnbaserade Google Cloud Platform med målet att vara där 2028 och som Test Automation Engineer blir du en viktig del av den resan. Till en början kommer du arbeta nära teamet med både manuell och utforskande testning för att förstå våra produkter, system och arbetssätt. Utifrån det hjälper du oss att steg för steg bygga en mer automatiserad, hållbar och molnanpassad testförmåga.


Du blir en del av IT Sport & Casinoprodukter, ett tvärfunktionellt team där ni arbetar nära varandra och gemensamt tar ansvar för kvalitet, leverans och lärande samtidigt som ni arbetar med välkända spel som Stryktipset, Powerplay m.fl.


I rollen kommer du att vara nära både teknik och verksamhet. Du kommer att bidra praktiskt i det dagliga testarbetet, samtidigt som du hjälper teamet att identifiera var testautomation gör störst nytta och hur vi kan bygga lösningar som är enkla att förstå, vidareutveckla och förvalta över tid.


Några exempel på vad du kommer att göra:

* Utföra både manuella, utforskande och automatiserade tester för att säkerställa våra produkters funktionalitet och stabilitet
* Bidra till att ta fram och vidareutveckla teststrategier, arbetssätt, ramverk och verktyg för en modern CI/CD-process
* Hjälpa teamet att steg för steg bygga en mer automatiserad testförmåga
* Utveckla och optimera automatiserade tester i hybrid- och molnmiljöer
* Delta i vår förflyttning från on-prem till moln med fokus på kvalitet, stabilitet och hållbarhet
* Samarbeta nära utvecklare, testare, produktägare, techlead och teamcoach
* Dela med dig av kunskap och bidra till att test och kvalitet blir en naturlig del av hela utvecklingsflödet
* Hålla koll på ny teknik, AI och moderna testverktyg samt omsätta det till förbättringar som gör skillnad


Kort sagt – du hjälper oss att skapa trygga, stabila och riktigt bra spelupplevelser för våra kunder, varje dag.

**Är du den som kommer att göra det?**


För att lyckas och trivas hos oss tror vi att du gillar att jobba teaminriktat och att du har ett genuint intresse för kvalitet, teknik och problemlösning. Du är nyfiken, prestigelös och tycker om att förstå hur saker fungerar, både tekniskt och ur ett användarperspektiv.


Du behöver inte komma in och ha alla svar från dag ett. Däremot tror vi att du har driv och vilja att tillsammans med teamet hitta smarta vägar framåt. Du vågar utmana befintliga arbetssätt på ett lyhört och konstruktivt sätt. Du delar gärna med dig av kunskap och tycker om att skapa förbättringar tillsammans med andra.


Vi tror att du känner igen dig i följande erfarenheter och kompetenser.

* Testning och kvalitetssäkring i agila eller tvärfunktionella team
* Manuell och/eller utforskande testning
* Testautomation, till exempel inom frontend, backend eller API-testning
* Programmeringsvana i exempelvis Python, C#, JavaScript eller TypeScript
* Förståelse för CI/CD och hur automatiserade tester passar in i utvecklingsflödet
* Förmåga att se helheten och prioritera testinsatser utifrån risk, nytta och kvalitet
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift


Det är meriterande om du också känner igen dig i nedanstående erfarenheter och kompetenser

* Molntjänster som AWS, Azure eller GCP
* Test i moln- eller hybridmiljöer
* Kunskap om eventdrivna system
* Verktyg som Playwright, Selenium, Postman, JMeter, REST Assured eller liknande
* Kubernetes, Github Actions
* Tidigare byggt eller vidareutvecklat testramverk
* Certifieringar inom test, cloud eller DevOps

**Om Tech på Svenska Spel**


På Svenska Spel hanterar vi 10 000 000 transaktioner varje dag, året runt och på sex dagar har vi hanterat samma transaktionsvolym som den största pengaöverföringsappen gör på en månad. Varje dag utvecklar, driftar och supportar vi ett av världens mest avancerade spelsystem, vi är med andra ord ett techbolag som sysslar med spel - inte tvärtom. Det här kommer med ett ansvar, både för folkets drömmar och spänning, men även för deras spelande. Vi flyttar ständigt fram gränserna för vår tech och låter aldrig vår Drömmaskin stå still. Kom och utveckla den med oss!

**Vi är Svenska Spel**


Svenska Spel är hela Sveriges spelbolag. Vi skapar hållbara och roliga spelupplevelser som bidrar till ett bättre Sverige. Genom spel som Triss, Stryktipset och Oddset ger vi våra fyra miljoner kunder spänning, glädje och drömmar. Våra spel är enkla och trygga och oavsett om man spelar online eller fysiskt, själv eller tillsammans med andra, så ska upplevelsen alltid vara positiv. Vi vill att fler ska spela hållbart hos oss och vår verksamhet ska bedrivas på ett socialt, ekonomiskt och miljömässigt ansvarsfullt sätt. Varje år går överskottet till statskassan. Vi är Sveriges största idrottssponsor och investerar nära 300 miljoner kronor årligen i svensk idrott. Vi är modiga, nyfikna och strävar efter enkelhet i allt vi gör samt skapar resultat tillsammans.

*Är du nyfiken på våra förmåner? Då hittar du dem* *här**!*

**Ansökan och kontaktuppgifter**


Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med placering i Stockholm eller i Visby med möjlighet till flexibelt distansarbete.


Vi jobbar löpande med urval och intervjuer så tveka inte med att skicka in din ansökan redan idag.


För frågor om tjänsten, kontakta Tony Nordström, Chef IT Sport & Casino Produkter, tony.nordstrom@svenskaspel.se


För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, kontakta Team Talent Acquisition, teamta@svenskaspel.se

title: DevOps Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
**A unique career in aviation technology**
------------------------------------------


Looking for a role where cloud infrastructure, automation, and software reliability meet the world of aviation?


At **DynamicSource**, we develop software systems and applications for the aviation industry. Our products support airlines, pilots, and aviation companies in running safer, more efficient, and more reliable operations.


As a **DevOps Cloud Platform Engineer**, you will play a key role in maintaining and improving the infrastructure behind our products. You will work with cloud services, deployment pipelines, automation, monitoring, security, and performance optimization — making sure our systems are stable, scalable, and ready to support a demanding industry.


This is not a generic infrastructure role. Aviation is a safety-conscious and operationally complex domain, where reliability, structure, and attention to detail matter. You will work closely with developers and domain experts to improve how we build, deploy, and operate our software.


You will join a skilled and focused team with a strong interest in both technology and aviation. We value ownership, practical problem-solving, and the ability to work independently in a remote-friendly setup.


More information about DynamicSource is available at:  

https://www.dynamicsource.se/

**Your role**
-------------


As part of our team, you will:

* Maintain, deploy, and improve our cloud infrastructure
* Work with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Ansible
* Support and improve deployment pipelines and release processes
* Monitor, tune, and optimize system performance
* Identify, evaluate, and implement new technologies and solutions
* Improve reliability, security, automation, and operational efficiency
* Collaborate with developers to support stable and efficient delivery
* Take ownership of infrastructure-related tasks and improvements

**Skills and experience**
-------------------------


We are looking for someone with experience in:

* Infrastructure as Code, Terraform and Ansible
* Linux administration
* Cloud infrastructure and production environments
* General IT security and secure infrastructure practices
* Automation, scripting, and operational tooling
* Working independently and staying well-organised in a hybrid or remote setup


You should be self-driven, disciplined, and comfortable taking responsibility for systems that need to run reliably.

**Good to have**
----------------


Experience with any of the following is a plus:

* AWS services such as EC2, ECS, RDS, and ALB
* Kubernetes
* Node.js, Python, PHP, Bash, or object-oriented programming
* CI/CD tools such as Jenkins
* Monitoring, logging, and observability tools
* Aviation systems, airline operations, or a general interest in aviation

**Work model and travel**
-------------------------


For this position, a **hybrid work model** applies. You are expected to work from our office in Stockholm at least **2 days per week**. The majority of the DynamicSource team is located in the greater Stockholm area.


DynamicSource also visits customers and participates in industry events such as forums, product expos, and aviation-related conferences. Some international travel may be required.

title: Chief Platform Owner
description:
Du vet den där känslan när teknik faktiskt gör skillnad på riktigt? När plattformar inte bara håller ihop system utan hjälper människor att skapa bättre upplevelser, fatta smartare beslut och bygga framtidens produkter? Det är där den här rollen kommer in.


Hos oss får du sätta riktningen för en av Svenska Spels viktigaste möjliggörare framåt, vår plattform. Du kommer att spela en nyckelroll i vår transformationsresa där modernisering, AI, datadrivet arbetssätt och skalbar techförmåga är avgörande för att vi ska fortsätta skapa spelglädje med omtanke och ge tillbaka till samhället.


Vi söker dig som gillar att tänka stort, skapa tydlighet i komplexitet och få människor från olika delar av organisationen att dra åt samma håll. Här får du kombinera strategi, teknik och affär i en roll där du bygger långsiktiga förutsättningar för innovation, utveckling och riktigt bra användarupplevelser.

**Vad kommer du att göra?**


Som Chief Platform Owner ansvarar du för vision, strategi och riktning för Svenska Spels plattform. Vår plattform består av flera gemensamma förmågor och verktyg inom exempelvis GitHub, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Backstage, AI, data och developer experience.


Du driver plattformen enligt *platform as a product*-principer där användarupplevelse, självservice, adoption och utvecklarproduktivitet står i centrum. Rollen handlar lika mycket om människor och förändringsledning som om teknik.


Du kommer bland annat att:

* Sätta strategisk riktning och roadmap för vår plattform
* Säkerställa hög säkerhet, robusthet och tillgänglighet i affärskritiska miljöer
* Skapa rätt förutsättningar för AI, data och moderna utvecklarupplevelser
* Arbeta nära arkitekter, produktägare och utvecklingsteam för att driva långsiktiga tekniska förmågor
* Skapa förståelse, engagemang och samsyn kring plattformens värde i organisationen
* Kommunicera komplex teknik på ett tydligt och inspirerande sätt
* Följa upp adoption, stabilitet och affärsvärde genom relevanta KPI:er


Du blir en viktig brygga mellan teknik och affär där fokus ligger på att skapa rätt förutsättningar för hela organisationen att utvecklas snabbt, säkert och hållbart.

**Är du den som kommer att göra det?**


Vi tror att du är strategisk, kommunikativ och trivs i komplexa miljöer där du får kombinera teknik, affär och människor. Du är bra på att skapa riktning, bygga engagemang och få olika delar av organisationen att dra åt samma håll.


För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:

* Erfarenhet av plattformar, produktutveckling eller tekniska ekosystem
* Arbetat strategiskt med vision, roadmap och långsiktig teknisk riktning
* God förståelse för cloud, DevOps, systemarkitektur och moderna plattformar
* Erfarenhet av exempelvis GitHub, GCP, Kubernetes, Backstage eller liknande
* Förståelse för säkerhet, skalbarhet och hög tillgänglighet i affärskritiska miljöer
* Förmåga att skapa affärsvärde genom AI, data och automatisering
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och vana att driva samarbete och förändring över flera team och områden


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av *platform as a product* och platform engineering.

**Om Tech på Svenska Spel**


På Svenska Spel hanterar vi 10 000 000 transaktioner varje dag, året runt och på sex dagar har vi hanterat samma transaktionsvolym som den största pengaöverföringsappen gör på en månad. Varje dag utvecklar, driftar och supportar vi ett av världens mest avancerade spelsystem, vi är med andra ord ett techbolag som sysslar med spel - inte tvärtom. Det här kommer med ett ansvar, både för folkets drömmar och spänning, men även för deras spelande. Vi flyttar ständigt fram gränserna för vår tech och låter aldrig vår Drömmaskin stå still. Kom och utveckla den med oss!

**Vi är Svenska Spel**


Svenska Spel är hela Sveriges spelbolag. Vi skapar hållbara och roliga spelupplevelser som bidrar till ett bättre Sverige. Genom spel som Triss, Stryktipset och Oddset ger vi våra fyra miljoner kunder spänning, glädje och drömmar. Våra spel är enkla och trygga och oavsett om man spelar online eller fysiskt, själv eller tillsammans med andra, så ska upplevelsen alltid vara positiv. Vi vill att fler ska spela hållbart hos oss och vår verksamhet ska bedrivas på ett socialt, ekonomiskt och miljömässigt ansvarsfullt sätt. Varje år går överskottet till statskassan. Vi är Sveriges största idrottssponsor och investerar nära 300 miljoner kronor årligen i svensk idrott. Vi är modiga, nyfikna och strävar efter enkelhet i allt vi gör samt skapar resultat tillsammans.

*Är du nyfiken på våra förmåner? Då hittar du dem* *här**!*

**Ansökan och kontaktuppgifter**

Vi jobbar löpande med urval och intervjuer så tveka inte med att skicka in din ansökan redan idag.

title: Azure Cloud Operations Engineer
description:
**Role: Azure Cloud Operations Engineer** 




**Location: Stockholm Sweden** 




**Job type : Contract** 




  





 Role Overview:
 



 Responsible for operational management and support of Azure cloud infrastructure across Dev, Test, and Production environments. The role focuses on Azure VM operations, security, monitoring, automation, DR readiness, and compliance support.
 



 Key Responsibilities:
 


* Manage Azure VMs (Dev/Test/Prod) – provisioning, scaling, decommissioning
* Perform OS patching, backup verification, and routine maintenance
* Execute and support Disaster Recovery drills
* Manage Azure Key Vault (keys, secrets, key rotation)
* Conduct RBAC & PIM access reviews
* Perform vulnerability scanning and remediation follow‑up
* Monitor services using Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Service Health
* Kubernetes and Container concept knowledge.
* Review Azure Activity Logs
* Perform cost monitoring and optimization
* Support compliance reporting including SAR / STR report transfers
* Automation / Job Scheduling, Cost Management & Optimization



  





 Mandatory Skills:
 


* Strong hands‑on experience with Microsoft Azure
* Azure VMs, Networking, Storage
* Azure Monitor, Log Analytics
* Azure Key Vault, RBAC, PIM
* Backup, DR, and security best practices
* Experience in regulated or compliance‑driven environments

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
Cloud Engineer – Bygg moderna molnlösningar och utvecklas som specialist
   

  

 Vill du arbeta med Azure på riktigt – där du får ta ansvar, påverka lösningar och utvecklas tekniskt i en miljö med högt tempo?
   

  

 Vi söker en Cloud Engineer som vill arbeta nära verksamheten, bygga moderna molnlösningar och fortsätta vässa sin kompetens.
   

  

 Hos oss blir du en del av ett team där kvalitet, struktur och tekniskt ansvar står i fokus – och där du får utrymme att göra skillnad.
   

  

 Tjänsten är placerad på plats.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Byna är ett Techbolag med fokus på IT, säkerhet, infrastruktur och digital arbetsplats. Vi arbetar som en långsiktig partner till våra kunder och hjälper dem att skydda, bygga och utveckla sina digitala miljöer.
   

  

 Vi arbetar som en nära teknisk partner till våra kunder, där vi tar ansvar för hela livscykeln – från arkitektur till drift och vidareutveckling. Fokus ligger alltid på kvalitet, säkerhet och långsiktighet.
   

  

 Samtidigt lägger vi stort fokus på våra medarbetare. Vi tror på långsiktighet, teknisk utveckling och att ge varje individ rätt förutsättningar att växa i sin roll.
   

  

**Din vardag hos oss**
 Som Cloud Engineer arbetar du i uppdrag där du har ett tydligt tekniskt ansvar och förväntas bidra med både kompetens och struktur. Du är med och designar, bygger och vidareutvecklar lösningar i Azure – ofta i komplexa och verksamhetskritiska miljöer.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Designa och implementera lösningar i Microsoft Azure
* Arbeta med Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Terraform eller Bicep)
* Bygga skalbara, säkra och robusta molnplattformar
* Arbeta med identitet och access (Entra ID)
* Delta i och driva migreringar till molnet
* Automatisera och effektivisera drift- och deploymentsflöden
* Samarbeta med utveckling, drift och säkerhetsteam
* Bidra till tekniska förbättringar och etablering av best practices


**Vi tror att du har**
 Vi söker dig som är trygg i din kompetens och vill fortsätta utvecklas inom cloud och modern infrastruktur.
   

  

**Erfarenhet och bakgrund**
* Minst 3–5 års erfarenhet inom IT, med fokus på cloud eller infrastruktur
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure i produktionsmiljö
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet


**Tekniska kunskaper**
* God erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code
* Stark förståelse för nätverk och säkerhet i molnmiljö
* Kunskap inom identitetshantering (Entra ID / Azure AD)
* Vana av automation och CI/CD
* Förståelse för hybridmiljöer


**Meriterande**
 Det är extra intressant om du:
   

  

* Har Azure-certifieringar
* Har arbetat med containerplattformar (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Har erfarenhet av DevOps-arbete
* Har ett eget teknikintresse och labbar med exempelvis molnlösningar
* Har intresse för eller erfarenhet av säkerhet i cloud


**Därför kommer du trivas hos oss**
 Hos oss handlar det inte bara om uppdraget du arbetar i – utan om hur du fortsätter utvecklas över tid.
   

  

 Vi arbetar aktivt med:
   

  

* Individuellt mentorskap
* Tydliga utvecklingsplaner
* Möjlighet att fördjupa och bredda din kompetens
* Stöd i certifieringar och kompetensutveckling
* En kultur där kvalitet, ansvar och kunskapsdelning står i centrum


 Vi tror på att ge våra medarbetare rätt förutsättningar att leverera på hög nivå – och samtidigt fortsätta utvecklas.
   

  

**Viktig information**
 För denna roll genomförs tekniska tester, bakgrundskontroll och kreditupplysning som en del av rekryteringsprocessen. Detta är en standardprocess för att säkerställa en trygg och säker arbetsmiljö för både medarbetare och kunder.
   

  

 Känner du igen dig ser vi fram emot din ansökan.

title: DevOps Integration Engineer (BizTalk Specialist)
description:
**Job Description :-** 




 We are seeking an experienced DevOps Integration Engineer – Specialist with strong expertise in BizTalk Server administration, integration support, and DevOps automation. The role involves maintaining and supporting enterprise integration solutions, monitoring production environments, handling incidents, and driving platform stability and operational excellence.
 



 The candidate will work within a collaborative international Agile team consisting of DevOps engineers across multiple countries. The role requires strong technical expertise in BizTalk environments, Azure DevOps pipelines, automation tools, and operational support processes.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 BizTalk Integration Support & Administration
 


* Maintain and support enterprise integration solutions built on BizTalk Server.
* Monitor BizTalk environments and ensure platform availability, reliability, and performance.
* Handle production incidents and perform root cause analysis for integration-related issues.
* Support daily operations including ticket monitoring and issue resolution.
* Perform BizTalk platform upgrades, patching, and maintenance activities.



 DevOps & Automation
 


* Develop and maintain build and release pipelines for BizTalk applications.
* Manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps.
* Work with Git, YAML, and PowerShell for deployment automation and infrastructure support.
* Support operational automation and continuous improvement initiatives.



 Monitoring & Operations
 


* Monitor production systems and integration environments proactively.
* Utilize Azure Dashboards and Application Insights for operational visibility and diagnostics.
* Ensure compliance with ITIL-based support and incident management processes.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to maintain operational stability.



 Collaboration & Agile Delivery
 


* Work closely with an international Agile DevOps team across multiple countries.
* Participate in daily operational support activities and Agile ceremonies.
* Collaborate effectively with developers, support teams, and business stakeholders.



 Required Skills & Experience
 



 Core Technical Skills
 


* 10+ years of experience in integration and middleware technologies.
* Strong hands-on expertise in:
* BizTalk Server Administration
* BizTalk integration support and monitoring
* BT360
* Azure DevOps Pipelines
* Git
* YAML
* PowerShell
* Windows Server Administration
* Microsoft SQL Server
* Experience with Azure Dashboards and Application Insights.
* Strong understanding of ITIL-based ticketing and support processes.



 DevOps & Operations
 


* Experience managing CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation.
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex integration and production issues.
* Knowledge of platform upgrades, patching, and environment maintenance.



 Soft Skills
 


* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
* Ability to work effectively in international and distributed Agile teams.
* Strong operational mindset with attention to detail and ownership.



 Preferred Experience
 


* Prior experience in the Energy and Utilities sector is considered an advantage.
* Experience working in enterprise-scale integration environments.



 Work Environment
 


* Collaborative international Agile team with engineers located across 4 countries.
* Primarily remote role within Sweden.
* Candidates located near Stockholm are encouraged to attend the office once a week, though office presence is not mandatory.
* English communication skills are mandatory.

title: Senior Software Engineer – Backend & Cloud Infrastructure
description:
**About Wittra** 





 Wittra is building the infrastructure layer for Physical AI—unified wireless IoT systems that connect, locate, and monitor industrial assets across demanding environments. From international airports to heavy process industries across the globe, our platform combines various wireless protocols like LoRa, Mioty, 6LoWPAN, and Ultra-Wideband (UWB) into a single governed network.
 





 We are located in central Stockholm (2 minutes from the central station) with all conveniences close by. The co-working environment is fresh, modern and edgy with great coffee and a diverse range of individual and group workspaces.
 





 We offer competitive salaries and benefits, along with a stock options program for the right person. We want someone who can work in the office 3 days a week on average, as we believe the team spirit benefits greatly from face to face collaboration.
 





 If you are looking for a dynamic, agile and challenging role working with cutting edge technologies in a small team environment, please fill in the form and attach your CV.
 




  





**Role Overview:** 





 We are looking for a hands-on
 
**Senior Software Engineer** 

 with a strong architectural mindset to own our cloud and backend infrastructure. Your mission is twofold: you will own and maintain our existing cloud infrastructure, while architecting and building the missing components needed to evolve our flexible cloud-agnostic architecture—one capable of running our Infrastructure Layer entirely on-premises on commodity hardware or in cloud infrastructure.
 





 You will act as the Technical Lead for a small team of 3–4 engineers. This is a purely technical leadership role where you will remain a strong individual contributor. Nothing is pre-decided; you will be the one evaluating the trade-offs and making the final calls on how we build and run our systems.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* **Cloud-Agnostic Architecture & DevOps:**
* Own and operate our existing GCP infrastructure while driving the migration to a cloud-agnostic stack. You will evaluate and decide the best orchestration approach (e.g., standard Kubernetes, K3s, MicroK8s, etc.) for running on constrained, on-premise hardware.
* Manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and Helm to ensure deployments are reproducible and scalable.
* Maintain and optimize our observability stack (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana) and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions).
* Develop, manage and maintain IoT data ingestion pipelines.
* **Backend Engineering & The BFF Layer:**
* Write production-grade Go (primary) and Python across microservices, APIs, and data pipelines.
* Architect the next generation of our backend and overhaul user access management.
* Design the Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) layer. While you will not be writing frontend code, you must deeply understand frontend architecture and consumption patterns to build a seamless bridge for our UI team.
* Design fluent APIs across GraphQL, gRPC, and REST to support our "Unified IoT Out Of The Box" application outputs.
* **SLA & Reliability:**
* Take ownership of our system reliability to meet our 99.9% SLA commitments. You will design, set up, and participate in a sustainable on-call rotation and handle advanced technical support duties as needed.
* **Data & Messaging Infrastructure:**
* Design and extend our service mesh handling high-throughput IoT messaging (NATS, MQTT).
* Manage and optimize our database architecture, utilizing PostgreSQL as the default and TimescaleDB for time-series sensor data.
* **Technical Leadership:**
* Lead, mentor, and guide a team of 3–4 engineers through code reviews, technical mentorship, and architectural direction—without stepping back from the keyboard yourself.



  





**Required Skills & Qualifications:** 



* **Relevant Experience:** 

 You will have a minimum of 5 years in a similar role and be able to demonstrate relevant experience.
* **Architectural Mindset:** 

 You think in trade-offs. You know how to decouple from proprietary cloud-provider APIs and can design robust systems optimized for constrained hardware.
* **Infrastructure & DevOps:** 

 Deep container orchestration expertise. You don't just write deployment YAML; you understand cluster operations, networking, and storage, and can confidently decide which lightweight K8s distribution (or alternative) is best for an on-premise edge server. Practical experience with Terraform and Helm.
* **Databases & Messaging:** 

 Strong experience with PostgreSQL (default) and time-series data. Proven experience with distributed messaging systems (NATS, MQTT, or similar pub/sub).
* **Core Languages:** 

 Production-level Go and comfortable with Python.
* **Frontend Empathy:** 

 Strong understanding of frontend architectures, enabling you to design highly effective BFFs and APIs.
* **API Design:** 

 Fluent in designing and implementing GraphQL, gRPC, and REST APIs.
* **Technical Leadership:** 

 Experience mentoring engineers and driving technical direction, combined with a relentless individual contributor drive.



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* **Identity & Access Management:** 

 Experience with Keycloak, OAuth2, and OIDC (crucial for our Multitenancy & User Management features).
* **Passion for IoT & Physical AI:** 

 Exposure to IoT platforms, edge computing, or embedded-adjacent systems and are excited by the unique challenges of hardware-software integration, device state management, and edge computing.
* **Startup DNA:** 

 Prior startup experience and comfort making sound architectural decisions with incomplete information.



  





**Why this role matters at Wittra:** 





 You will have real ownership at the architectural level, not just ticket execution. Your work will directly power real customers at scale—like Arlanda Airport and Eramet—ensuring that whether their data lives in the cloud or strictly on-prem, their Physical AI infrastructure remains operable, secure, and efficient. With a direct line to product and technical leadership and no bureaucratic overhead, your impact will be immediate.

title: Solutions Architect (EMEA North)
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.
   

  

 We are looking for data experts who have a strong background in building data platforms and love to use their skills to supercharge data teams. Our team helps customers on their data journey with Snowflake, which is very fast becoming the central data platform for companies big and small. That means you will work on some of the most challenging data projects you can find, in a post-sales capacity.
   

  

 We are hiring a range of seniority levels, though we do not currently hire people without relevant experience. During the interview process, we will form a view on your current level of expertise and match it to our internal career levels.
   

  

**What we are offering:**
**We help each other to stay on top of the game** 
 and up-to-date with the latest features in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Snowflake had the biggest software IPO of all times and we continue to grow at a rapid pace, which means there is ample opportunity to change the future of data analytics by joining us. Not only will you work with Snowflakes latest and greatest capabilities, but also t
 **he cutting edge technologies of our partners** 
**.**
 Our
 **compensation package** 
 offers a very competitive salary, plus equity on top. We are looking after the work life balance of our employees, which means our annual vacation is at the top of the market. We also have Snowdays - have a look at
 **this LinkedIn post** 
 or other #snowday tagged posts from Snowflakes around the world.
   

  

 For young families we are offering
 **very attractive parental leave** 
 and support with adoption, surrogacy, pregnancy or infant care related questions. Private medical and insurance plans are part of our benefits, in markets where this is a customary employment benefit. Furthermore we provide strong private pension plans and other benefits, tailored to your country of employment.
   

  

**Who we are:**
 The Snowflake Data Cloud was built from the ground up for the modern cloud, which means we can easily scale from empowering small start-ups to the largest companies in the world.
   

  

 It is our mission to
 **mobilize the world's data** 
 , so that businesses can be truly data driven. We think it is important that our platform is easy to use, which allows us to power companies at all stages of the data maturity journey.
 **Here** 
 you can find examples of how we have helped companies in a wide range of industries.
   

  

 We have seen a tremendous amount of success with our platform and continue to grow at a very fast pace, both in Europe and worldwide. That means we are constantly adapting the way we work and input is welcome from everybody on the team, which gives you the chance to make an impact.
   

  

**What we do:**
 We are the service delivery team of Snowflake, which means we help our customers by
 **creating solutions that shape their businesses** 
 . Once our customers have made the decision to implement Snowflake, we accompany them in their journey with us.
   

  

 This journey might start with our migrations team, who help our customers to plan and execute the migration of their data to Snowflake. Or it might begin with a Quick Start consultation, where we simultaneously explain best practices for working with Snowflake and translate them to our customers' specific use case.
   

  

 After a period of time we might return to analyse our customers progress and provide further guidance. We might also look at specific topics such as their security posture.
   

  

 Other customers prefer a more continuous engagement with us. In these cases we stay with them for a year or longer, in order to guide them from the initial setup of the platform all the way to advanced use cases that solve their trickiest challenges.
   

  

**How we work:**
 We
 **provide guidance** 
 to our customers. For most implementation work, we partner with our customers' engineering teams or members of our partner network.
   

  

 While our core expertise is Snowflake, our platform is almost always at the centre of larger data architectures, which we help to design. Examples include architecting for GDPR or integrating with existing data lakes.
   

  

 In addition to helping our customers,
 **we help each other** 
 by answering questions on our internal Slack channels, writing content for our internal knowledge base or organising internal lunch and learn sessions.
   

  

 Currently we work
 **mostly remote** 
 , which has proven to be successful. While we do have region specific practices, we work with customers from across Europe. A consultant from Finland might for example work with a customer in the Netherlands. Internally we work together as a global team.
   

  

**What are we looking for:**
 People who have a strong background in building
 **data platforms** 
 and working on the surrounding data landscape. Some of our colleagues have a stronger background in
 **data warehousing, data engineering** 
 , while others might be more at home on the
 **data science or analytics** 
 side. The data warehouse is where we all come together.
   

  

 Our ideal candidate can translate vague business requirements into technical requirements, find the appropriate solution and communicate both its technical merits and the business impact to stakeholders at different seniority levels. We are constantly adding new features, so explaining new concepts is essential for our success.
   

  

 Since Snowflake is only available in the cloud, having experience of architecting solutions on AWS, Azure or GCP is a big plus. Similarly, having experience with data security, governance and discoverability concepts will be helpful in this role.
   

  

 While
 **SQL** 
 is a language everybody on the team knows very well, Snowflake is fast evolving to allow native integrations with
 **Python, Java** 
 and
 **Scala** 
 & with
 **Snowpark** 
 , if you have experience with
 **Spark** 
 you will definitely be able to put these skills to good use.
   

  

**DataOps** 
 or
 **DevOps** 
 for data teams is getting ever more important. Setting up
 **CI/CD** 
 pipelines with automated tests and rollback capabilities is an activity we regularly engage in.
   

  

**Bonus points to have:**
 We think Data Sharing will play a big role in the next generation of data cloud so if you are familiar with
 **Data Sharing** 
 &
 **Data Marketplace** 
 implementation that would be a big advantage.
   

  

 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: AI-specialist
description:
Do you want to build AI solutions that drive real change, instead of getting stuck in theory? We are looking for a hands-on AI wizard, who loves to experiment, build and get things into production fast, for one of our customers in Stockholm.
 



  





**About the role** 




  





 This is not a classic Data Scientist role. The focus is on using existing AI and generative tools in smart ways, setting up workflows and getting things live.
 



 You will work closely with developers, designers and product teams in a creative environment, with a clear focus on how AI can create real value in product development.
 



  





**Examples of what you will do** 




  




* Set up processes and AI pipelines to automate things like idea creation, development pipelines, QA and testing, etc.
* Stay on top of the latest AI tools and platforms and test what actually works well in a high pace development context.
* Explore how AI can be used for audio, graphics, content and production in an efficient and safe way.
* Find concrete opportunities to streamline how teams work and drive them from idea all the way to production-ready solutions.
* This role is for someone who likes high pace, iteration and building things that quickly impact the final product.



  





**Who we think you are** 




  





 You have a solid technical foundation and you are at your best when you get to build, tweak and improve, rather than write research papers.
 



  





 We believe you:
 


* Have experience building and deploying solutions that use AI, Machine Learning or generative models.
* Are comfortable working with code, APIs and different AI platforms.
* Enjoy moving quickly from idea to prototype to something that actually runs in production.
* Have a pragmatic mindset: you choose what works, not what is the most theoretically elegant.
* Have a passion for experimenting with tools like; Weavy, Runway, ComfyUI, Luma Labs, Higgsfield AI, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Cursor, Lovable, Lyria, Kling, Codex, Claude & GitHub Copilot to name a few.



  





 You do not need to know everything on day one. The most important thing is that you are curious, want to learn and enjoy testing and building.
 



  





**Why this might be a good fit for you** 




  





 Here you will:
 


* Help shape how AI is used for creating products in a high pace environment.
* Work closely with creative teams where your solutions have a direct impact on the work flow and development experience.
* Get room to test new tools and ways of working, as long as they create clear value in day-to-day work.



  





 If you have any questions feel free to contact Henrik Dellgren,
 
 henrik.dellgren@novare.se
 
 or Elin Lidström,
 
 elin.lidstrom@novare.se
 
 .

title: Software Architect
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Software Architect / Solutions Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will be responsible for
 **defining and overseeing the overall system architecture** 
 for our AI-powered platform. You will collaborate with engineering teams, product managers, and stakeholders to design
 **scalable, secure, and high-performing solutions** 
 that align with business objectives.
   

  

 You will play a key role in shaping our
 **technology strategy, evaluating new tools and frameworks, and ensuring best practices** 
 in software design, cloud infrastructure, and system integration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain the overall architecture and system design for scalable and efficient software solutions.
* Provide technical leadership to engineering teams, guiding them in best practices for architecture, coding, and system scalability.
* Design and document high-level system diagrams, data flows, and API structures.
* Evaluate and recommend technologies, frameworks, and cloud services to optimize performance, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and security in all architectural decisions.
* Oversee system integrations, including microservices, APIs, and third-party services.
* Work closely with DevOps and SRE teams to ensure smooth deployment and operational reliability.
* Establish coding and architecture standards, ensuring maintainability and scalability of codebases.
* Identify and mitigate technical risks, ensuring system resilience and future scalability.
* Conduct architecture reviews and performance audits to continuously improve system efficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in software development and architecture.
* Strong expertise in system design, cloud computing, and microservices architecture.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) and cloud-native architectures.
* Proficiency in backend technologies (e.g., Node.js, Python, Java, .NET) and experience with modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue).
* Knowledge of databases (SQL and NoSQL), caching strategies, and data pipelines.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, API design, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Strong understanding of security best practices, identity management, and encryption techniques.
* Ability to evaluate trade-offs in architectural decisions, balancing scalability, cost, and complexity.
* Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex architectural concepts to technical and non-technical stakeholders.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Software Engineer (Data)
description:
*Natural Cycles° is a leading women’s health company that developed the world’s first birth control app, used by millions globally. We are a fast growing startup, and we promote an international working environment filled with smart and ambitious colleagues based in Stockholm, Geneva, New York, and remotely. Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 As a Software Engineer (Data) you will assist and maintain the data initiatives at the company, by providing validated data and the infrastructure to calculate key performance indicators to different stakeholders while still safeguarding our users' privacy and anonymity into your work.
 



**Please note that we are hiring for this role in Stockholm, Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing** 




  




* Maintain and improve our data warehouse: improve data models, performance of views and reports, etc.
* Maintain and improve our data pipelines: integrate new sources, improve monitoring and performance, etc.
* Investigate and report data quality issues and data inconsistencies
* Collaborate with stakeholders and other departments by providing dashboards and reports
* Collaborate with data scientists by providing adequate raw data for their needs
* Automate routine operations related to data
* Assist the Senior Data Engineer with incoming requests for change



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 




  





**General** 



* Some understanding of data infrastructure and deployment pipelines
* Good knowledge of analyst tools to allow data visualization (we use Tableau and Mixpanel)
* Great analytical skills to conduct root cause analysis and similar investigations
* Collaborate with R&D teams as well as stakeholders from other teams, such as medical product and regulatory



**Data** 



* Knowledge of ETL and data pipelines (written in Python and Typescript)
* Interest in Business Intelligence reporting tools (we currently use Tableau)
* SQL (data definition, data manipulation, analytical functions)
* Python



**Backend** 



* RESTful API
* Typescript (or strong bases in another software development language)



  





**What we offer** 




  




* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will work alongside knowledgeable colleagues in the continuous growth and skill enhancement environment
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person. For this role, you’ll collaborate closely with our Senior Data Engineer, who is based in Stockholm.
 



  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible.
 



 We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




  





 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Master thesis in AIOps | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you want to explore how artificial intelligence can shape the future of operations in one of the leading technology-driven banks in the Nordics?
   

  

 At SEB, we believe in combining innovation, collaboration, and long-term thinking to create real value for our customers and society. We are now offering a master’s thesis opportunity within AIOps for students who want to combine academic depth with hands-on relevance and contribute to applied research where AI, observability, and large-scale operations meet.
   

  

**About The Thesis**
 This thesis opportunity is for students who are excited by the possibility of applying AI to meaningful, real-world challenges in Operations. Together with the AIOps team, you will define a research question, place it in a relevant academic and technical context, and design a suitable methodology for investigation. Depending on the chosen scope, the work may include data analysis, model development, system design, experimentation, or comparative evaluation of alternative approaches. The ambition is to create work that is both academically solid and practically valuable.
   

  

 AIOps is a collaborative and technically ambitious team working across infrastructure, data platforms, AI-enabled services, and internal applications. As a thesis student at SEB, you will work with experts, learn about large-scale technology, and apply research methods to create practical solutions.
   

  

*Example research directions* 
 :
   

  

* Agentic AI: Autonomous agents that automate and optimize operations
* Multi-agent workflows: Several AI agents collaborating on complex tasks such as distributed detection, coordinated response, or resource allocation
* Predictive models for incident escalation or service degradation
* Root-cause analysis using machine learning or graph-based methods
* Refine large language models for knowledge retrieval and decision support
* Optimize anomaly detection in operational telemetry


 The final thesis topic will be selected collaboratively based on student interest and feasibility.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* Curious, analytical, and structured in your way of working
* Interested in AI, data-driven analysis, and operational improvement
* You are motivated by the opportunity to explore a relevant research problem in close collaboration with industry and inspired by the possibility of creating work that combines academic quality with real-world value.
* It is a plus if you have experience with AI/ML, cloud-native systems, or Git-based workflows


**What You Can Expect**
* A chance to work on real operational challenges in a modern, data-rich, and business-critical environment
* Close collaboration with experienced engineers and practitioners in an environment that values curiosity, learning, and knowledge sharing
* An opportunity to produce academically meaningful work while contributing insights that can support SEB’s continued technology transformation


**How To Apply**
 Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, and we therefore encourage you to apply as soon as possible, but no later than 30th June 2026. Please include your CV, academic transcripts, and a brief motivation describing your interest in the thesis area and why you would be a strong match for this opportunity. We look forward to hearing from students who want to combine academic excellence with the opportunity to create meaningful impact at SEB.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Unity Developer Intern
description:
**About us** 




 XR Solutions builds augmented reality tools for industrial clients — think factory floors, heavy machinery, complex maintenance workflows. We use machine learning to make AR actually useful in those environments, not just flashy. Our team is small, the problems are real, and the tech ships to production.
 



  





**The role** 




 We are seeking a dedicated XR Developer Intern to join our team.
 



  





 You’ll design, build, and implement XR applications in Unity for real-world industrial use cases — contributing directly to a product in development and heading toward launch.
 



  





 You’ll work closely with developers and be expected to take ownership in a fast-paced environment.
 



  





 Remote to start.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Design, build, and implement XR applications in Unity
* Develop interactive UI and features for AR environments
* Work with AR frameworks (e.g., ARKit)
* Create and iterate on 3D assets (Blender, Maya, or similar)
* Collaborate with developers to bring features into production
* Conduct research on XR hardware (HMD) and technology solutions
* Contribute to product development and pilot deployments
* Test and iterate on XR features in real use cases



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong experience with
 **Unity (AR/XR development)**
* Experience with
 **AR frameworks (e.g., ARKit)**
* Experience with
 **3D tools (Blender, Maya, or similar)**
* Familiarity with
 **Figma**
* Understanding of Augmented Reality principles



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience with Xcode
* Experience working with HMDs in XR environments



  





 We value people who can work across both design and implementation and are comfortable taking ownership.
 



  





**Important to know** 



* This is an
 **unpaid internship**
* Strong performance can lead to a
 **paid role**



  





 This role involves contributing directly to implementation, not just concept work.
 



  





**What you’ll gain** 



* Hands-on experience building XR applications
* Exposure to real-world industrial use cases
* Experience working toward a product launch and pilot customer
* Insight into working in a small, fast-moving team



  





**How to apply** 




 If you’re excited about this opportunity and eager to learn, please send your resume outlining your interest in the position.
 



  





 We look forward to helping you grow your skills and advance your career in XR Design & Development.

title: Backend engineer - Java
description:

 04-06-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
