title: Specialist Solutions Architect Databases, AGS-EMEA-Europe North
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you passionate about helping customers build database and cloud solutions? Come join us !
  

  

At Amazon, we've been investing deeply in building the right solutions that allow you to derive the most value from your database infrastructure. AWS is looking for a specialist solutions architect for our Database team, who will be the Subject Matter Expert (SME) helping customers to design complex solutions. As part of the team, you will work closely with Europe North customers across all industry verticals to enable large-scale use cases and drive the adoption of advanced AWS services. You will interact with other Solution Architects in the field, providing guidance on their customer engagements, and you will develop white papers, blogs, reference implementations, and presentations to enable customers to fully leverage AWS.  

  

AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and trustworthy support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.
  

  

AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small- and mid-market accounts to enterprise-level customers including public sector.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As a key member of the AWS Europe North Specialist Solutions Architecture team your work will include:  

* Working closely with our product and field teams and 3rd party model providers, you will help enable new capabilities for our customers to develop and deploy data workloads on AWS infrastructure
* Design best in class database infrastructure solutions for all stages of customer and product lifecycles.
* You will have the technical depth and business experience to deploy database and data strategies.
* Partner with SAs, Sales, Business Development and Service teams to accelerate customer adoption and revenue attainment.
* You will also work closely with account teams, research scientists, and product teams to drive model implementations and new solutions.
* Thought Leadership - Evangelize and share best practices through forums such as AWS blogs, whitepapers, reference architectures and public-speaking events such as AWS Summit, AWS re: Invent, etc.
* Act as a technical liaison between customers and the AWS teams to provide customer driven product improvement feedback.
* Develop and support an AWS internal community of related subject matter experts.

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship and Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

Hybrid Work  

We value innovation and recognize this sometimes requires uninterrupted time to focus on a build. We also value in-person collaboration and time spent face-to-face. Our team affords employees options to work in the office every day or in a flexible, hybrid work model near Amazon offices.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5+ years of specific technology database domain area experience
* Deep knowledge and experience on at least one commercial relational database (Oracle, SQL Server, IBM2), or open source database (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB).
* Familiarity with AWS technology
* BA/BS degree or experience in lieu


- - 5+ years of specific technology database domain area experience  

- - Deep knowledge and experience on at least one commercial relational database (Oracle, SQL Server, IBM2), or open source database (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB).  

- - Familiarity with AWS technology  

- - BA/BS degree or experience in lieu**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Knowledge of non-relational databases such as mongodb, couchdb, redis
* Technical Communication Skills; able to bridge the gap between business outcomes and technical requirements
* AWS Certifications

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Senior Supply Chain Consultant – Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
description:
*”Det som gör att jag trivs så bra? Möjligheten att jobba med Business Central på en nivå jag inte sett hos andra arbetsgivare. Här finns en djup kompetens, ett starkt BC‑community och projekt som verkligen utmanar mig. Jag känner att min erfarenhet används fullt ut – och att jag fortsätter utvecklas.”*


Så beskriver Fredrik varför han trivs som **Senior Supply Chain Consultant** på Fellowmind.

**Om rollen**
-------------


Som Supply Chain Consultant hos oss arbetar du nära våra kunder med att utveckla, förbättra och framtidssäkra deras affärsprocesser inom supply chain. Du ingår i ett projektteam där vi tillsammans tar ett helhetsgrepp om kundens verksamhet och stöttar dem i allt från implementation och uppgradering till vidareutveckling av deras affärssystem.

**Arbetsuppgifterna är varierande och kan bland annat bestå av:**

* Leda förstudier och omsätta verksamhetsbehov till smarta BC‑lösningar
* Ta fram både standardlösningar och kundanpassad funktionalitet
* Driva workshops, utbildningar och rådgivning gentemot kund
* Ansvara för testning, parametersättning och datamigrering
* Coacha kunder i hur de får maximalt värde av sin BC‑miljö
* Arbeta i projektteam tillsammans med experter från flera av Fellowminds affärsområden


Våra kunder är främst medelstora företag, ofta inom handel och distribution – där Supply Chain‑processerna är avgörande för affären. Med vår **tillsammans‑kultur** och våra värderingar – *Always personal, Better together, Serious about fun* och *Act with courage* – är vi ett stöd genom hela projektresan och vidare i kundens fortsatta tillväxt.

**Varför Fellowmind?**
----------------------


Med närmare **100 specialister inom Business Central** är vi en av Sveriges största och mest erfarna BC‑partners. Det märks i kulturen, i kompetensutbytet – och i vilka projekt vi tar oss an.


Vi arbetar sällan i isolerade ERP‑projekt. I stället levererar vi **plattformsprojekt inom hela Microsoft‑ekosystemet**, där Business Central är navet. Tillsammans med specialister inom CRM/Customer Engagement, Modern Work, Data & Analytics, Integration, Cloud & Security och Custom Apps skapar vi lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för våra kunder.


Det betyder att du hos oss:

* Arbetar i **komplexa plattformscase** där Supply Chain är affärskritiskt
* Omgås av **seniora kollegor** med djup specialistkompetens
* Får ta ansvar i **större och mer avancerade projekt**
* Är på en arbetsplats där din erfarenhet tas tillvara – och byggs vidare


Kort sagt: du får jobba som den **seniorkonsult du faktiskt är**.

**Vem är du?**
--------------


Vi söker dig som **idag arbetar som konsult** och som känner igen dig i något av följande:

* Du arbetar som **Supply Chain‑konsult inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central**

*(t.ex. inköp, lager, logistik, produktion, planering)*  

**eller*** Du arbetar som **applikationskonsult inom ett annat ERP‑system**


(exempelvis Jeeves, SAP, Visma, IFS, Unit4, Pyramid m.fl.)  

och har gedigen erfarenhet av Supply Chain‑processer – och är nyfiken på Microsoft Dynamics‑världen**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:**

* Konsulterfarenhet och vana att arbeta kundnära i projekt
* Stark förståelse för Supply Chain‑processer och affärsflöden
* Förmåga att översätta verksamhetskrav till systemlösningar
* Erfarenhet av att strukturera och prioritera arbete i parallella uppdrag


Som person är du affärsmässig, lösningsorienterad och trygg i din kompetens. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap, trivs i samarbete och tror – precis som vi – på laget före jaget.


Du kommunicerar obehindrat på **svenska och engelska**, i tal och skrift.

**Det praktiska**
-----------------

**Start:** Gärna omgående, men vi har full förståelse för uppsägningstid  

**Omfattning:** Heltid. Vi är flexibla och utgår från att det ska fungera för alla parter  

**Placering:** Malmö, Helsingborg, Göteborg, Stockholm, Jönköping eller Växjö


Rekryteringsprocessen består av inledande samtal, djupintervjuer, tester/case samt referenstagning.  

Vi arbetar med löpande urval – skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag.

**Om Fellowmind**
-----------------


Fellowmind är en ledande europeisk digitalseringspartner och erbjuder tjänster för hela Microsofts ekosystem. Vi integrerar AI i alla våra lösningar för att hjälpa människor att frigöra tid och fokusera på arbete som skapar verkligt värde.


Som en del av Microsofts exklusiva Inner Circle och vinnare av Årets Affärssystemprojekt 2026 hjälper våra över 2 000 Fellows företag i hela Europa att kombinera teknik, affärsnytta och mänskligt fokus.


Läs mer om Fellowmind

title: Ekonomikonsult inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
description:
*”Det bästa med mitt jobb? Variation och möjligheten att göra verklig skillnad. Ena stunden effektiviserar jag finansprocesser hos ett e‑handelsbolag, nästa stund stöttar jag en grossistverksamhet i deras tillväxtresa. Att se hur våra lösningar faktiskt påverkar kundernas vardag – på riktigt – är otroligt motiverande. Lägg till ett team där hjälpsamhet och kompetens går hand i hand, och en plattform i teknisk framkant, så har du receptet på ständig utveckling.”*


Så beskriver Johanna varför hon trivs hos oss på Fellowmind – och i rollen som **Ekonomikonsult inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central**.

**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Som ekonomikonsult hos oss arbetar du nära våra kunder med att utveckla, förbättra och framtidssäkra deras finansiella affärsprocesser. Du ingår i ett projektteam där vi tillsammans tar ett helhetsgrepp om kundens verksamhet och stöttar dem i allt från implementation och uppgradering till vidareutveckling av deras affärssystem.

* Förstudiearbete för att förstå kundens verksamhet och identifiera behov, samt ta fram lösningar – både standard och kundanpassade
* Genomföra workshops och utbildningar för kundens användare
* Testning, parametersättning och migrering av data
* Löpande stöd och rådgivning kring kundens ekonomiprocesser
* Hjälpa kunderna att få maximalt värde av sin Business Central‑lösning
* Rådgivning kring strategiska systemval för kringprocesser, exempelvis koncernrapportering


Med vår **tillsammans‑kultur** och våra värderingar – *Always personal, Better together, Serious about fun* och *Act with courage* – är vi ett stöd genom hela projektresan och vidare i kundens fortsatta tillväxt.

----------------------


Med närmare **100 specialister inom Business Central** är vi en av Sveriges största och mest erfarna BC‑partners. Det märks i kulturen, i kompetensutbytet – och i vilka projekt vi tar oss an.

title: Security Consultant med fokus på Microsoft
description:
### **Så här ser rollen ut**


Arbetet sker i kundprojekt i en konsult- och MSP-leverans där fokus ligger på att implementera, konfigurera och vidareutveckla Microsoft Security-lösningar i Windows Server-miljöer, med särskilt fokus på Defender for Endpoint och Defender for Servers/Defender for Cloud.


I rollen ingår att identifiera förbättringar, tydliggöra vad som behöver göras och koordinera genomförandet tillsammans med kund, kundteam och leveransteam. Du deltar i tekniska forum och för en rådgivande dialog kring prioriteringar, risker och genomförbara åtgärder.


Du bidrar även till att utveckla arbetssätt, metoder och erbjudanden inom Microsoft Security, och säkerställer att lösningar följer etablerad best practice.

### **Tekniskt fokus och typiska frågeställningar**


Tyngdpunkten ligger på säkerhetsarbete kopplat till Windows Server och Windows Client: härdning, säkerhetskonfiguration, sårbarhetshantering, patchrelaterad samverkan, loggning och felsökning.


Du arbetar nära Defender-funktionalitet för endpoint- och serverskydd, inklusive attack surface reduction och rekommendationer från Defender for Cloud. Du säkerställer att åtgärder implementeras korrekt, prioriteras rätt och förvaltas över tid.


Rollen innebär även samverkan med andra delar av Microsoft Security-ekosystemet, exempelvis Identity, Office 365 och Cloud Apps, beroende på kundens miljö och behov.

### **Det här ser vi att du har med dig**


Det här ser vi att du har med dig för att snabbt kunna bidra i rollen och ta ansvar i kundprojekt:

* Praktisk erfarenhet av **Windows Server-miljöer** och servernära säkerhetsarbete (konfiguration och härdning)
* Praktisk erfarenhet av **Windows Client-miljöer** och servernära säkerhetsarbete (konfiguration och härdning)
* Praktisk erfarenhet av **Microsoft Defender for Endpoint** och **Defender for Servers/Defender for Cloud** kopplat till servermiljöer
* Förståelse för sårbarhetshantering, patchning, loggning och säkerhetsåtgärder i servermiljöer
* Förmåga att driva implementation, konfigurering och vidareutveckling relativt självständigt i kundprojekt


Svenska i tal och skrift för kunddialog från start, och kan genomgå säkerhetsprövning/bakgrundskontroll vid behov

#### **Det är också värdefullt om du har erfarenhet av**


Utöver grundförutsättningarna i rollen kan följande erfarenheter bidra till att du snabbare kommer in i uppdraget och kan ta ett större ansvar:

* Erfarenhet från konsultroll eller Managed Service Provider
* Erfarenhet av andra delar av Defender-portföljen (t.ex. XDR, Identity, Office 365, Cloud Apps)
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsövervakning, incidenthantering eller threat hunting
* Certifieringar som SC-200, SC-100 eller AZ-500


Efter cirka 6 månader förväntas du kunna ta eget ansvar i kundprojekt och driva implementation, konfiguration och utveckling av Defender for Endpoint och Defender for Servers med begränsat stöd.

#### **Konsultmässighet och självledarskap**


Du skapar snabbt förtroende hos kunden genom att sätta dig in i deras miljö och behov, och omsätter det till tydliga, genomförbara rekommendationer. Arbetet drivs vidare hela vägen till faktisk effekt, med ett strukturerat arbetssätt och utgångspunkt i etablerad best practice.


I rollen tar du ett naturligt ansvar för att prioritera, ta initiativ och föra arbetet framåt nära kund. Du kommunicerar rakt och begripligt, håller ihop genomförandet mellan olika parter och använder teamet som stöd när det behövs. Samtidigt bidrar du till att utveckla både leveransen och erbjudandet över tid.

### **Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**

Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.


Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, och det förekommer logik-och personlighetstest, för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".


Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
company_description: Advania är ett techbolag som utformar skräddarsydda lösningar och skapar hållbara värden genom smart användning av teknik.

title: Data Center Technician , DCC Communities
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.  

  

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.  

  

We are looking for Data Center Technicians to join our expanding Infrastructure Operations team. Data Center Technicians are the primary resolver and troubleshoot and solve a range of datacenter infrastructure issues including, but not limited to: hardware, fiber, networking, and related problems. You will be part of the Data Center Operations (DCO) team, overseeing the operation and maintenance of the IT infrastructure and hardware for data centers in AWS Cloud regions. You will become the primary resolver for your support team, and gain troubleshooting skills on different hardware and software cases. You will be able to troubleshoot and solve most infrastructure issues and engage other appropriate solutions groups on more complex problems to drive solutions..  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* SAFETY

  

Follow and maintain the highest safety standards and diligently encourage a world-class safety culture. Own the safety initiatives and projects to foster a strong safety culture.  

  

* DATA CENTER OPERATIONS (DCO)

  

This position involves:  

* Diagnosing hardware and network problems followed by physical repairs
* Troubleshooting events within internal Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
* Performing root cause analysis of equipment failures
* Manual handling and lifting of equipment may be required (weight limits in accordance with regulations)
* Working rotating shifts (morning/night) as well as weekends to maintain the 24/7 data center environment

  

A valid (EU) driving license is required as Data Centers may not have any public transportation available nearby.  

  

Location Requirements:  

Our data centers are located in remote areas where access via public transport may be limited. Therefore, a valid EU driving license is required for this role.  

  

Work Schedule:  

This is a 100% onsite in-person position due to the hands-on nature of managing mission-critical infrastructure and data center industry.  

  

A day in the life  

In this role, you'll be working on our advanced ticketing system, managing a diverse workload and solving complex server hardware issues.
  

  

You'll be part of a collaborative team that keeps our cloud infrastructure running smoothly, responding to both automated directives and team leadership with exceptional time management and adaptability.  

  

Your expertise in problem ticket tracking and escalation procedures will be crucial as you consistently meet and exceed Amazon's high standards for technical proficiency and operational excellence. This role is vital in maintaining the efficiency and reliability of our sophisticated data center infrastructure – you'll be working and supporting the face of Cloud technology in the region.  

  

We're looking for skilled technicians with a passion for technology to help us expand our Cloud to the next level.
  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 1+ years of technical experience
* General knowledge of troubleshooting server hardware issues
* Basic networking experience
* Ability to work well with others in a team environment, displaying excellent time management skills
* Ability to take direction from both a directed work system and/or a team lead
* Able to lift/move up to 18kg equipment
* Basic networking knowledge
* Valid EU driving license

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience with problem ticket tracking, prioritization, and escalation procedures
* Understanding of maintenance windows/change management procedures
* Basic understanding of data center facilities
* Networking administration and/or certification
* CCENT/CCNA, Network+, A+
* Scripting skills
* Bash, Python, Perl, Ruby, etc.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: AI Enablement Lead | Digital Efficiency
description:
**Hey there!**

  

This is a rare kind of role. You will be the first person to do this job at BWH Hotels Scandinavia, which means no inherited processes and no existing playbook.


If that sounds exciting rather than daunting, keep reading.


We are Scandinavia’s largest collective of family and privately owned hotels, and we are ready to get more out of AI across the whole organisation. Not because it is trendy, but because our people deserve better tools and our organisation deserves to run more efficiently. What we do not have yet is the right person to make that happen. That is where you come in.


If you thrive on building trust with colleagues across all parts of the business, love making complex things simple, and know how to turn individual discoveries into real efficiency gains across the whole organisation, we want you to become our **AI Enablement Lead**.


As AI Enablement Lead you are part of the Tech Team, reporting directly to the CTO, and based in our Stockholm office.


The role is approximately 60% coaching and enablement and 40% product and strategy.

#### **As a person, you are…**


Genuinely curious about how people work. You can sit with someone in Sales or Finance, ask the right questions, and leave them feeling more capable than when you arrived.


You are organised and structured. You know that good intentions do not drive change, but clear plans and consistent follow-through do. You are comfortable being the bridge between a colleague who is not yet convinced about what AI can do for them and a boardroom conversation about our three-year digital roadmap. And, you are excited by the idea of building something from the ground up in an organisation that is ready to move.

#### **What you will own**

***AI standard-setting & governance***


You will define how our organisation works with AI, building on what already exists and taking it further. We currently have no coordinated approach to AI platforms. Individual teams use various tools independently. One of your first priorities will be to audit what exists, evaluate our options (including a potential Microsoft Copilot deployment), and set clear standards for which tools we use, how we use them, and how they connect to our data and security requirements. You will be closely involved in governance and cyber processes related to AI.

***Business unit discovery & coaching***


You will work directly with each business unit to map their processes, understand pain points, and identify where AI can make a tangible difference. You bring curiosity and a structured approach. You know how to identify, document and map processes before reaching for a solution. Findings are translated into the business plan and AI roadmap. You are also confident to designing and delivering AI upskilling programs and hands-on training sessions for colleagues for all levels.

***Product ownership and vendor management***


You formally own defined AI product areas within our organisation. This means setting the vision and roadmap, tracking performance, and taking responsibility for outcomes. It also means owning the vendor relationships that sit under those products.  

When we evaluate new SaaS AI tools you run a proper structured pilot and not just a vendor demo. You define evaluation criteria, involve the right stakeholders, measure outcomes, and make a clear recommendation. You know the difference between a tool that impresses in a demo and one that actually sticks in daily use.

***Digital Ambassador Group***


You will establish and lead a Digital Ambassador Group, an internal network of engaged colleagues from each business unit, with a parallel network reaching into our hotels. This group becomes the engine of AI adoption.

***International collaboration***


AI initiatives do not exist in isolation. You will collaborate closely with BWH International on shared AI programmes and ensure our local efforts align with global direction. You will also work closely with our Data responsible, because meaningful AI starts with good data.

#### **Your superpowers**

* A natural coach who can train and inspire people with patience and clarity
* Strong process mindset and the ability to identify, document and map processes before reaching for a solution
* Comfortable with prompt engineering, practical use of generative AI tools (LLMs, automation platforms), and workflow automation
* Familiar with the AI and cloud landscape such as Azure AI services, and platforms such as LangChain or Hugging Face are not new to you. You know enough about how these pieces fit together to have a meaningful conversation and spot a good solution.
* Enough technical hands-on ability to prototype ideas, validate concepts and lead technical discussions with confidence. You can build a proof of concept and assess feasiblity.
* A confident product and project manager with skills in roadmapping, vendor management, business case writing and following through
* Change management skills and an understanding that adoption is a people challenge, not just a technology one
* Comfortable working across multiple priorities and stakeholders at the same time. You thrive in a setup where responsibilities shift as the organisation evolves.
* A communicator who translates between business units and technical stakeholders
* Fluent in English and a Scandinavian language (Swedish, Norwegian or Danish)

#### **Nice to have**


Experience with Microsoft 365 and ideally Microsoft Copilot.


Experience in running a digital ambassador, change agent, or similar internal network.


Experience with the Atlassian project management suite

#### **Curious to be part of an exciting future?**


Apply through our portal and describe on how you have helped a non-technical colleague get more out of digital tools.


All candidates will complete a logic and personality test before moving on to second stage with on-site interviews. Candidates will be called forward for interviews throughout the recruitment process.


Valid work permit for Sweden is a requirement.

**BWH Hotels Scandinavia – local gems everywhere in Scandinavia**


We are Scandinavia's largest collective group of family- and privately-owned hotels. We are a large and quite diverse family, with many different personalities and offerings, but at our core we all share the same belief — the belief in genuine hospitality.


Through knowledge and commitment, we ensure an experience of high quality. We are professional, with a colourful and personal tone. We believe in teamwork, which is why we find it important that we work together to challenge the hotel industry. You will be a part of a unique hotel chain, where we offer more personalised experiences for all our guests in Scandinavia.


BWH Hotels is a leading, global hotel chain consisting of three hotel groups: Best Western Hotels & Resorts, WorldHotels and Sure Hotel Group. There are approximately 4,000 hotels worldwide, and in Scandinavia there are over 180 hotels spread across more than 100 destinations.

title: Azure Data Engineer
description:
* Help design, build and continuously improve the clients online platform.
* Research, suggest and implement new technology solutions following best practices/standards.
* Take responsibility for the resiliency and availability of different products.
* Be a productive member of the team.


 Requirements
   

  

* Minimum 5 years of experience as a Data Engineer.
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL workflows using Microsoft Azure and Databricks.
* Ingest, transform, and model data from multiple structured and unstructured sources to support reliable analytics and reporting solutions.
* Develop semantic data models and build Power BI reports and dashboards to enable data-driven decision-making.
* Perform data quality validation, integrity checks, and ensure compliance with security and governance standards.
* Document data engineering processes, technical designs, workflows, and implementation outcomes.
* Support organizational data awareness initiatives and provide training where required.
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders, analysts, and technical teams to understand requirements and deliver effective data solutions.
* Strong hands-on experience with: Microsoft Azure, Azure Databricks, SQL, Python, CI/CD implementation and automation
* Experience with data ingestion, transformation, and semantic data modeling.
* Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts, ETL frameworks, and modern data architectures.
* Experience handling and processing large-scale datasets, including tables with billions or trillions of rows, is highly preferred.
* Familiarity with Power BI for reporting and analytics.
* Experience with Azure DevOps and Azure Storage Explorer.
* Excellent English communication and collaboration skills.
* Strong analytical and proactive problem-solving mindset.
* Open-minded, collaborative, and adaptable to new ideas and technologies.
* Passion for continuous learning and process improvement.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery environments.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computational Engineering Science, Information Systems, or a related field.


 Benefits
   

  

* A challenging, innovating environment.
* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: Azure Cloud Specialist till Akademiska hus
description:
*Vill du axla en strategisk nyckelroll och driva nästa generations hybridinfrastruktur hos en av Sveriges viktigaste samhällsaktörer?* 
 Som Azure Cloud Specialist hos Akademiska Hus får du kombinera teknisk innovation i absolut framkant med den långsiktiga trygghet och det starka utvecklingsfokus som ett av landets största fastighetsbolag erbjuder.
 



  





 Hos oss är IT en helt central möjliggörare för att skapa hållbara, smarta och innovativa campus för högre utbildning och forskning. Vår tekniska miljö är en sann hybridlösning där en avancerad, molnbaserad Azure-plattform lever sida vid sida med komplexa on-prem-miljöer. Detta ställer unika krav på din kompetens – vi söker dig som inte bara besitter djup teknisk expertis inom hybrid arkitektur i Azure, utan som också har förmågan att kliva fram som en trygg teknisk ledare med kraften att driva både komplexa team och modern teknik framåt.
 



  





 Välkommen till en arbetsplats där dina idéer och initiativ värdesätts och där du kan vara med och forma framtiden!
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 




 För att axla denna seniora roll behöver du ha en gedigen teknisk grund kombinerat med förmågan att agera kravställare och teknisk ledare.
 


* Akademisk utbildning inom IT/data eller motsvarande mångårig yrkeserfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i en senior specialistroll med praktisk vana av att designa och drifta storskaliga hybrid- och on-prem-miljöer.
* Aktuell certifiering inom Microsoft Azure (exempelvis Azure Administrator Associate, Security Engineer Associate eller motsvarande expert-certifiering).
* Djupgående teknisk expertis inom Azures kärnkomponenter (Compute, Network, Storage, Identity, Security och Automation).
* Gedigen erfarenhet av Active Directory, Entra ID, PowerShell samt hantering av Conditional Access-policys.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure Virtual Desktop, Application Gateway och Application Proxy.
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.



  





**Meriterande** 



* Kunskap inom DNS och Linuxmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Terraform eller annan Infrastructure as Code (IaC)-lösning.
* Kunskaper inom certifikatshantering, PKI, ADCS.
* Certifiering Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions.



  





**Ansvarsområde** 




 Vem är du? Förutom den unika kompetensen inom teknik och ledarskap tror vi du trivs när din arkitektoniska blick sträcker sig bredare än enbart Azure Cloud; du har förmågan att se helheten i en storskalig infrastruktur och driva förändringsresor på ett strategiskt plan. Som person är du en utpräglad lagspelare som ser samarbete med arkitekter och övriga delar av verksamheten som en självklarhet för att nå gemensamma mål. Med ett coachande, pedagogiskt och engagerande förhållningssätt stöttar du dina kollegor i infrastrukturteamet, samtidigt som du är en skicklig kommunikatör som enkelt översätter komplex teknik till affärsnytta för olika intressenter.
 



  




* Ta ett övergripande ansvar för arkitektur, implementering och stabil drift av vår komplexa hybridmiljö (Azure och on-prem).
* Leda tekniska infrastrukturprojekt och agera mentor/coach för teamets medarbetare.
* Framtidssäkra, säkra och optimera Azure-plattformen med fokus på avancerad nätverksarkitektur, automation och identitetshantering.
* Samarbeta tätt med enterprise-arkitekter och verksamheten för att realisera strategiska IT-mål.
* Säkerställa proaktiv kostnadsstyrning (FinOps) och effektiv resursallokering i molnmiljöerna.



  





 Nyfiken?
 



 Känns detta som en möjlighet för dig, ta chansen och sök nu! Urval kommer att ske löpande så vi ser fram emot din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Har du frågor om tjänsten eller processen är du välkommen att kontakta Niklas Seger på niklas.seger@akademiskahus.se / I denna rekrytering samarbetar Akademiska Hus med Randstad. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Erik Perborn erik.perborn@randstad.se eller sophia.fredriksson@randstad.se om du har frågor.
 



  





 Bakgrundskontroll och säkerhetsklassning kommer att genomföras på slutkandidater.
 



  





*Akademiska Hus är ett av Sveriges största fastighetsbolag. Vi utvecklar och förvaltar lokaler för högskolor och universitet och skapar förutsättningar för världsledande utbildning och forskning. Genom att även erbjuda labb och kontor för privata företag blir våra campus mer innovativa och hållbara platser, som främjar samverkan, kunskapsutveckling och kreativitet. Vi satsar på våra medarbetare och ser till att de växer. Alla har individuella uppdrag och vi erbjuder ledarutvecklingsprogram för chefer och projektledare. Att lära och tänka nytt är en del av vårt DNA. Genom ett gediget utbud av lärandetillfällen och utbildningar, samverkan och erfarenhetsutbyte utvecklas vi ständigt. Med bra chefer som ger oss förutsättningar, förtroende och mandat att leverera, utvecklas vi både som människor och bolag. Hållbarhet är ledstjärna i allt vi gör. Och hållbara blir vi tillsammans. Vi vet att våra medarbetare är avgörande för vår framgång och erbjuder därför alla olika typer av initiativ inom friskvård och hälsa.*

title: Solutions Architect for Public Sector
description:
**Description**
 Are you passionate about cloud technology and helping customers innovate?
   

  

 Join our AWS Solutions Architecture team in Sweden and empower large enterprises across industries to innovate at speed and scale with cloud technologies.
   

  

 We are looking for a skilled, self-motivated technical leader to join a team of supportive, experienced professionals. As a Solutions Architect in the Public Sector team, you get to impact the lives of millions of citizens and help a variety of different customers - all the way from digital-native and government-linked companies to security-focused government agencies. Overall, the customers we work with include government agencies, state-owned companies, educational institutions, healthcare and non-profit organizations.
   

  

 Our Public Sector teams help customers build a deeper understanding of hyper-scale cloud technology and application architectures, and they have the consultative skills required to drive successful outcomes.
   

  

 Solutions Architects work hand in hand with AWS customers to help them make the most of the Cloud. They are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with organizations at all stages of cloud adoption. Solutions Architects also take a leading role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.
   

  

 Solutions Architects own the overall technical relationship between customers and AWS and make recommendations on security, cost, performance, reliability and operational efficiency. They work to understand the customer's business needs and give prescriptive guidance on how to create business value with technology. To do this they collaborate with other teams such as account management, professional services, support, product teams and the AWS partner ecosystem.
   

  

 In this role you will get to practice your creativity, linking technology to tangible solutions and educating AWS customers about the art of the possible. You will have the opportunity to define or invent cloud-native reference architectures for a variety of use cases. The Solutions Architecture team is a diverse group of technologists from a variety of backgrounds. Practical knowledge of the AWS platform is desired but not required, provided you have a sound technical foundation and a desire to learn.
   

  

 You will have the support to grow your expertise in industry and technology areas of depth. Every day you will learn something new from your customers, your peers and your own experiments.
   

  

 At Amazon you will be encouraged and rewarded for doing what is right for the long-term success of the customer. We value your passion to discover, invent and build on behalf of customers.
   

  

 If you can educate AWS customers about the art of the possible, while investigating the impossible, come build the future with us.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* As a Solutions Architect, you will work directly with customers to accelerate their projects and recommend best-practice architectures in line with their long-term business outcomes.
* You will own the technical relationship with the customer and operate as their trusted advisor. The best interests of the customer will shape the guidance you provide.
* Share the voice of the customer to influence the roadmap of new features and services for the AWS platform.
* Create and capture best practices, technical content and new reference architectures (e.g. white papers, code samples, blog posts).
* Evangelize and educate about AWS technology (e.g. workshops, user groups, meetups, public speaking, online videos or conferences).
* Contribute to the growth of the Solutions Architecture organization by hiring, coaching and mentoring others.
* Develop areas of depth in technical domains relevant to your interests and your customer's outcomes.


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship & Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English
* Experience of Software, Systems or Data Design
* Knowledge of a modern programming language (Python, JavaScript, Go, .Net, Java, etc.)
* Passion for technology and for learning


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience designing, building, refactoring or operating large scale and impactful IT projects - either on premises or in the cloud
* Working knowledge of cloud native architectures
* In depth working knowledge in a technology domain such as distributed internet-scale web or mobile applications, DevOps, Serverless, Big Data, analytics, Machine Learning, enterprise workloads (SAP, VMware, Windows etc.), high-performance databases (SQL and/or NoSQL), complex networking implementations, highly secured workloads etc.
* Knowledge of modern data processing techniques and systems
* Experience working in a customer-facing role
* Experience collaborating effectively with internal or external stakeholder groups at multiple levels
* AWS certification (e.g. AWS Solutions Architect Associate or Professional)
* Continued or advanced learning (Master, MBA, PhD or equivalent)


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch)
   

  

 Job ID: A10412574

title: Azure Data Platform Engineer to Handelsbanken
description:
We are looking for a Cloud Data Platform Engineer to help us build Handelsbanken's future cloud-based Data Platform to meet the bank's future data & analytics needs. You will be part of a tight-knit, rapidly evolving team, building out one of the bank's most strategic platforms.
   

  

**Your Team**
 You will be part of a small team of platform engineers who are all passionate about building robust and scalable platforms. Your team is responsible for building and operating the technical foundations of the cloud data platform to enable data engineers from around the bank to build high-performant data pipelines and data products. The team is also responsible for building and maintaining the data ingestion pipelines to make business data available to data engineers.
   

  

**Your role**
 You must have hands-on experience deploying and configuring Azure Databricks workspaces - not just using Databricks for data engineering workloads. As a platform engineer your primary role will be focussed on building, configuring, scaling, operating and maintaining all of the components that comprise the Azure Data Platform, with a clear focus on Azure Databricks as the heart of the platform. In addition, you will also actively work with configuring various data integrations and data ingestion pipelines to make business data available to data engineers and end-users.
   

  

 Typical tasks that the role includes are:
   

  

* Deploying and configuring new Databricks workspaces, services and integrations using Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC)
* Creating and maintaining infrastructure build & release pipelines
* Continually optimising / automating routine tasks and procedures
* Ensuring that appropriate cost and platform monitoring capabilities are in place
* Building a professional network to foster effective cooperation with other areas of the IT-organisation where the team has dependencies (such as the IT security and Infrastructure provisioning divisions)
* Working closely with data engineers to secure optimised platform utilisation
* Configuring and enabling data integrations across a variety of patterns (API, file, events, CDC etc.) to support data ingestion into the platform
* Building and maintaining data ingestion pipelines
* Working actively to build capabilities to actively monitor the data quality of data coming into the data platform
* Actively participating in, and contributing to team planning ceremonies (stand-ups, backlog refinement, increment planning etc.)


 On top of your technical tasks, you will be expected to actively contribute with your knowledge, experience and personality in building a high-performing team.
   

  

**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who has a demonstrable, "hands-on" track record of building, implementing, operating, and scaling an enterprise-scale cloud data platform built around Azure Databricks. This role focuses on platform engineering rather than data pipeline development. While familiarity with data engineering concepts is useful, the primary responsibility is building and operating the underlying Azure Databricks platform
   

  

 The technical skills we are looking for include:
   

  

* Deep knowledge and experience of designing and implementing enterprise-grade Azure Databricks platforms
* Good understanding of workspace architectures
* Strong experience in building and deploying cloud infrastructure across multiple environments using a Infrastructure as Code (IAC)
* Experience of working hands-on with cluster policies, pools, autoscaling strategies
* Strong experience of Azure IT security setup topics e.g. Private Link, networking design, Azure AD (Entra ID), RBAC, and managed identities
* Good experience of storage account architecture (ADLS Gen2 patterns)
* Good Azure cloud foundation skills (security, networking, encryption, access management etc.)
* Experience with data ingestion and data ingestion pipelines using various patterns (CDC, events, streaming, file, API etc.)
* Working knowledge of data engineering (DataOps) ways of working
* Knowledge, or experience, of using Microsoft Fabric or other similar SaaS data platforms is an advantage


 You are a proactive and solution-oriented individual who not only identifies opportunities for improvement but also takes ownership of implementing them. You have a strong service mindset and consistently put the customer first in everything you do. Additionally, you have a natural inclination to share knowledge and insights, both within your team and across organizational boundaries. You actively contribute to fostering a collaborative work environment where openness and teamwork are an integral part of everyday operations.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**
*As part of Handelsbanken’s recruitment process, a background check conducted by an external party is required and must be approved for the final candidate before employment can take place*
**Contact Details**
**Recruiting Manager:** 
 Graeme Newcomb, graeme.newcomb@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Talent Acquisition Partner:** 
 Alva Jonerot, alva.jonerot@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Union Representative Finansförbundet:** 
 Emma Rydell, emma.rydell@handelsbanken.se or Håkan Brovell, hakan.brovell@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Union Representative Akademikerföreningen:** 
 Bjarne Nilsson, bjarne.nilsson@handelsbanken.se

title: Cloud Solution Architect
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Brinner du för att omsätta modern teknik till verklig affärsnytta? I så fall är detta rollen för dig. Vi på Vivicta söker just nu en
 **Cloud Solution Architect** 
 som vill vara med och effektivisera våra kunders verksamheter! Hos oss får du arbeta med Azure, Power Platform och Dynamics 365 i en roll där du både får tänka strategiskt och vara hands-on i lösningarna.
   

  

 Som konsult hos oss blir du en teknisk specialist inom Azure, Power Platform och Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain. Du blir en del av ett växande team där arbetet präglas av frihet under ansvar och nära samarbete med kund.
   

  

**Som Cloud Solution Architect på Vivicta kommer du att**
* Arbeta nära kund i en konsultativ roll för att effektivisera deras verksamhet
* Driva implementationer, utbildningar och vidareutveckling av lösningar
* Hitta och implementera de bästa tekniska lösningarna för våra kunder
* Vägleda och stötta utvecklingsteam i tekniska frågor
* Hjälpa kunder att optimera sina system och miljöer
* Delta i både projektleveranser och applikationsförvaltning
* Bidra i dialoger med nya och befintliga kunder tillsammans med säljteamet
* Arbeta i projekt som ofta har internationell prägel, tillsammans med ett erfaret team och med möjlighet att påverka både lösningar och arbetssätt.


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har erfarenhet av Azure, Microsoft Power Platform och Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain
* Har erfarenhet av integrationer mellan olika system
* Har arbetat med Microsofts utvecklingsverktyg, t.ex. Visual Studio och DevOps
* Är självgående, flexibel och resultatinriktad
* Har ett framåttänkande mindset och trivs i en agil miljö
* Har en stark vilja att utvecklas och hålla dig uppdaterad inom ny teknik
* Talar och skriver flytande svenska och engelska


**Det är meriterande om du också har**
* Djupare erfarenhet av Power Platform (t.ex. Logic Apps, Power Apps, Power BI, Dataverse)


**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Vi erbjuder dig professionell tillväxt, meningsfulla projekt, öppen kultur och en enastående balans mellan arbete och privatliv! Vi erbjuder dig en möjlighet att skapa framtiden för en snabbt växande och viktig sektor. Vi tror att vår organisationskultur är en viktig del för att du ska bli framgångsrik. Vi tillhandahåller en flexibel hybrid arbetsmodell som en del av vår kultur och vårt sätt att arbeta. Slutligen tror vi också på nyfikenhet och konstant lärande som en livsstil där du behöver skola om dig varje dag när nya möjligheter dyker upp.
   

  

**Hur du ansöker**
 Bifoga ditt CV eller LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmanar dig att söka redan idag. Om du har några frågor angående denna roll, vänligen kontakta anställande chef, Norman Fromy, norman.fromy@vivicta.com.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Skellefteå/Hybrid
   

  

*Vi genomför bakgrundskontroller på alla slutkandidater, och vissa roller kan kräva säkerhetsprövning antingen under rekryteringen eller senare — alltid i enlighet med lokal lagstiftning samt med stor omsorg och konfidentialitet.*
*Vivicta tackar nej till samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*

title: Senior delivery consultant – GenAI
description:
**Description**
 The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Senior Delivery Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the project lifecycle.
   

  

 Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Senior Delivery Consultant you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of each customer. You’ll work closely with stakeholders to gather requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and managing risks throughout the project.
   

  

 The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of solutions, technologies, and industries.
   

  

 \*\*This role requires you to be a Swedish National and have business level proficiency in the Swedish language\*\*
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to customer needs
* Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project delivery
* Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective migration strategies
* Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging technologies
* Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating reusable artifacts


 A day in the life
   

  

**About AWS**
 Diverse Experiences: AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job below, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture - Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship & Career Growth - We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance - We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5+ years of experience in cloud architecture and implementation
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, related field, or equivalent experience
* Machine learning algorithms and model development (supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning)
* Deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, MXNet)
* Model optimization, tuning, and performance analysis
* AI/ML service architecture (SageMaker, Bedrock, Comprehend, Rekognition)


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS experience preferred, with proficiency in a wide range of AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation)
* AWS Professional level certifications (e.g., Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) preferred
* Experience with automation and scripting (e.g., Terraform, Python)
* Knowledge of security and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR)
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audience


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch)
   

  

 Job ID: A10432760

title: Cyber Security Engineer
description:
IT Security Engineer – Arbeta operativt med säkerhet i moderna IT‑miljöer
   

  

 Vill du arbeta hands-on med IT‑säkerhet i miljöer där kvalitet, struktur och säker drift är avgörande?
   

  

 Vi söker en IT Security Engineer som vill arbeta operativt med att implementera, drifta och förbättra säkerhetslösningar i komplexa IT‑miljöer.
   

  

 Hos oss får du en roll där du arbetar nära tekniken och säkerställer att säkerhetslösningar fungerar i praktiken – varje dag.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Byna är ett Techbolag med fokus på IT, säkerhet, infrastruktur och digital arbetsplats. Vi arbetar som en långsiktig partner till våra kunder och hjälper dem att skydda, bygga och utveckla sina digitala miljöer.
   

  

 Vi arbetar som en nära teknisk partner till våra kunder, där vi tar ansvar för hela livscykeln – från arkitektur till drift och vidareutveckling. Fokus ligger alltid på kvalitet, säkerhet och långsiktighet.
   

  

 Samtidigt lägger vi stort fokus på våra medarbetare och deras utveckling över tid.
   

  

**Din vardag hos oss**
 Som IT Security Engineer arbetar du operativt med att implementera, konfigurera och drifta säkerhetslösningar. Du säkerställer att säkerheten fungerar i praktiken och hanterar löpande förbättringar i miljön.
   

  

 Du är nära systemen, nära drift och nära verkliga incidenter.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Implementera och konfigurera säkerhetslösningar
* Arbeta med identitet och access (IAM, Entra ID) i operativ drift
* Hantera och följa upp säkerhetsincidenter
* Arbeta med logghantering, övervakning och threat detection
* Säkerställa patchning och sårbarhetshantering
* Arbeta med endpoint‑ och klientskydd
* Hantera säkerhetsplattformar (t.ex. SIEM, EDR, Defender)
* Säkerställa att säkerhetskontroller är korrekt implementerade
* Arbeta nära drift-, infra- och utvecklingsteam
* Delta i förbättringsarbete kopplat till säkerhet i miljön


**Vi tror att du har**
 Vi söker dig som har en stark operativ profil och trivs med att arbeta nära tekniken.
   

  

**Erfarenhet och bakgrund**
* Flera års erfarenhet inom IT‑säkerhet eller infrastruktur med säkerhetsfokus
* Erfarenhet av arbete i operativa IT‑miljöer
* Erfarenhet av incidenthantering och säkerhetsarbete i drift
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet


**Tekniska kunskaper**
* Erfarenhet av identitet och access (IAM, Entra ID eller liknande)
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsverktyg (t.ex. SIEM, EDR, antivirus, Defender)
* Förståelse för nätverk och nätverkssäkerhet
* Erfarenhet av sårbarhetshantering och patchning
* Erfarenhet av logghantering och övervakning
* Erfarenhet av arbete i både on‑prem och molnmiljöer
* Grundläggande kunskap inom scripting/automation är meriterande


**Meriterande**
 Det är extra intressant om du:
   

  

* Har stark erfarenhet inom IAM i operativ drift
* Har arbetat med Microsofts säkerhetsplattform (Defender, Sentinel etc.)
* Har erfarenhet av SOC-arbete eller liknande funktion
* Har erfarenhet av säkerhet i Azure eller andra molnmiljöer
* Har arbetat med incident response eller threat hunting
* Har certifieringar inom IT‑säkerhet


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Operativ, strukturerad och noggrann
* Lösningsorienterad och analytisk
* Trivs i en miljö med högt tempo
* Kommunikativ och samarbetsinriktad
* Tar ägarskap och ansvar för säkerhet i praktiken


**Därför kommer du trivas hos oss**
 Hos oss arbetar du i en miljö där säkerhet inte bara är en strategi – utan en aktiv och central del av den dagliga leveransen.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder:
   

  

* Individuellt mentorskap
* Tydliga utvecklingsplaner
* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom säkerhet, cloud och infrastruktur
* Stöd i certifieringar och kompetensutveckling
* En kultur där kvalitet, ansvar och teknisk utveckling står i centrum


**Viktig information**
 För denna roll genomförs bakgrundskontroll och kreditupplysning som en del av rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Som en del av urvalsprocessen genomförs även logiska tester och personlighetstester.
   

  

 Känner du igen dig ser vi fram emot din ansökan.

title: Senior Product Manager - ML / Subscriptions Growth
description:
Spotify’s mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators.
   

  

 The Subscriptions Mission builds and evolves Spotify’s subscription products and marketplace experiences to drive sustainable user and revenue growth globally. We focus on awareness, acquisition, activation, retention, and monetization strategies that help users unlock the full value of Spotify while enabling the business to scale efficiently and responsibly.
   

  

 User Understanding sits within Subscriptions and focuses on building the intelligence layer that makes our growth efforts smarter—through decisioning, data signals, and ML models that power personalization across surfaces and lifecycle moments. You’ll work at the intersection of machine learning innovation and commercial strategy, partnering closely with ML engineers, data scientists, data platform teams, product insights, and business stakeholders to shape high-impact growth initiatives.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Define the strategy and roadmap for key subscriber growth initiatives, focusing on applying AI/ML in the right places balancing business goals, ROI and technical feasibility
* Deeply understand business metrics and user behavior, leading to well-researched hypotheses for testing and future AI/ML development
* Lead end-to-end product development from problem definition through system deployment and adoption, working across research, engineering, and business teams
* Drive experimentation programs that rigorously test ML-powered features against baselines, making data-informed decisions about when to scale AI-driven experiences
* Collaborate with engineers and data scientists on technical decisions to drive innovation and impact
* Build products at scale that impact hundreds of millions of users across diverse markets, considering localization, infrastructure constraints, and varying user contexts
* Stay current with AI and ML technology trends, looking for opportunities to match with key business objectives


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years product management experience with proven track record launching ML/data-driven products at scale
* You have strong technical fluency in data science, recommender systems, machine learning concepts, model evaluation, A/B testing, and data pipelines. You can review and challenge technical decisions.
* You have strategic judgment about when to apply ML vs. GenAI vs. other tools and you understand the cost-benefit tradeoffs of complex systems
* You understand subscription business and e-commerce fundamentals in consumer products
* You are an excellent communicator who can collaborate cross functionally and communicate complex ideas to stakeholders at all levels


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London (UK) or Stockholm (Sweden)


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Artificial Intelligence Consultant
description:
**About Stellar Capacity** 




 Stellar Capacity is Sweden's leading educational company developing digital skills and future-oriented leadership for individuals and organizations. Our programs provide unparalleled learning experiences featuring world-class faculty, transformative leadership focus, and practical knowledge application - making us the top choice for businesses looking to leverage rapid technological developments.
 



  





**The opportunity** 




 Are you passionate about making AI understandable and meaningful for people?
 



 Do you love creating moments of insight, guiding learning experiences, and helping others grow their confidence in new technologies?
 



 At Stellar Capacity, we’re looking for a dynamic AI Consultant to help us lead AI-focused programs, workshops, and learning journeys for some of Sweden’s most forward-thinking organizations.
 



  





 In this role, you’ll collaborate with our expert team to deliver powerful, hands-on learning experiences that connect AI with real-world challenges and opportunities. From executive leaders to frontline professionals, you’ll support people across sectors in building the mindset and skills they need to navigate an AI-driven future.
 



  





 This is a chance to help shape how organizations across Sweden understand, explore, and work with AI. If you're excited by the idea of empowering others through education, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





**Your role** 



* Lead comprehensive AI and Generative AI programs, workshops, and learning journeys for professionals across all organizational levels
* Deliver engaging presentations on AI fundamentals, prompt engineering, and practical applications
* Facilitate hands-on workshops and learning sessions with cutting-edge tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Copilot
* Guide strategic discussions on implementation and organizational change
* Create meaningful learning experiences that drive real business outcomes



  





**Your profile** 



* Strong knowledge of the generative AI landscape, especially large language models (LLMs) and fast-evolving tools
* Extensive hands-on experience with tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, and multimodal AI platforms
* Excellent facilitation and public speaking skills, with experience engaging both senior leaders and diverse participant groups
* Proven track record of designing and delivering impactful training or workshop experiences—particularly for executive audiences
* Ability to cut through the AI hype and help others focus on real, applicable business value
* Full professional proficiency in Swedish, with the ability to facilitate executive-level workshops and presentations in Swedish
* Fluent English, written and spoken



  





**We're looking for you who:** 



* Knows how to command a room, keeping energy high and engagement strong throughout intensive learning experiences
* Makes complex technical concepts accessible and actionable for business leaders
* Has a natural ability to read the room and adapt to different people and learning styles
* Stay curious and up to date with the latest in AI developments and translates innovations into practical value
* Champions digital transformation and can help others grow as future-ready leaders
* Balances technical depth with inspirational delivery



  





**We offer:** 



* Opportunity to work with some of Sweden's top leaders and organizations
* Join a world-class faculty and stimulating network of AI experts and leadership profiles
* Continuous professional development at the forefront of AI advancement
* Flexible working arrangements aligned with program schedules



  





 If you're ready to be the face of AI transformation for Sweden's leading organizations, we want to hear from you!

title: Data Engineer
description:
**Data Engineer (IoT / PostgreSQL / Grafana)** 




 We are supporting a company within the mechanical/industrial engineering sector in strengthening their data infrastructure and analytics capabilities.
 



  





 The assignment focuses on restructuring and optimising an existing backend setup to support large-scale telemetry data from production environments and test systems.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Optimise and restructure PostgreSQL databases to ensure high performance with large volumes of time-series and test data
* Design scalable and efficient data models supporting both raw data ingestion and aggregated reporting
* Build and implement a modern visualisation setup (Grafana or similar BI tools)
* Develop dashboards for real-time monitoring of production KPIs and measurement data
* Review and improve API/data interfaces between IoT devices and backend platform
* Ensure secure and structured data access (role-based access control)
* Support the overall data architecture across IoT, backend, and analytics layers



  





**Required Experience & Technical Skills** 



* Strong experience with PostgreSQL (database design, indexing, performance tuning)
* Hands-on experience with Nhost ecosystem, including Hasura (GraphQL APIs) and authentication
* Proven experience with Grafana (or similar BI tools) connected to SQL databases
* Experience working with IoT platforms and telemetry data pipelines
* Understanding of data ingestion from embedded systems into cloud platforms
* Experience designing scalable backend data architectures
* Experience working with APIs and data integration layers
* Knowledge of data security and role-based access models



  





 Additional Requirements
 


* Ability to work mainly onsite in Stockholm
* Fluent in English

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 



  


 To further empower our engineering organisation, we are looking for a product-minded Senior Platform Engineer. Our platform team's mission is clear: Empower teams to deploy and operate services quickly and safely through a self-service platform that reduces cognitive load and enforces security, reliability, and compliance by default.
 


  


  


 At this level, your biggest shift is moving from owning your personal work to owning organizational outcomes, and from following paths to creating the "paved road" for others. You will act as a true technical partner to our engineering teams, treating the platform as a product, actively shaping its vision, and driving the roadmap that enables our developers to build faster and more safely.
 


  






  




**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 
  

  
* **Architect the Paved Road:** 
 Own and evolve the product deployment chain utilized by our development teams, including CI/CD pipelines  and underlying delivery infrastructure. You will design these systems for scale, aiming for appropriate complexity ("as simple as possible, but no simpler")
  
* **Drive Ways of Working:** 
 Act as a cultural and technical driver for modern engineering practices. You will champion and implement SLO frameworks, promote trunk-based development, and build the tooling required for product teams to significantly increase their service availability
  
* **Champion Observability:** 
 Ensure monitoring, logging, and tracing are built in from the start, never as afterthoughts. You will provide the observability primitives that allow product teams to truly understand and trust their systems in production
  
* **Span Boundaries & Elevate Standards:** 
 Work closely with Infrastructure, Security, and Product teams to ensure a consistently high standard. You will embed "security and compliance by design" into the daily workflows of the entire engineering org without sacrificing velocity
  
* **Multiply your impact:** 
 Lift the skills of those around you by developing teammates, mentoring colleagues through detailed feedback, and evangelising platform capabilities across the broader engineering organization
  

  


  


  




**WHO YOU ARE**
